summary: Large unstubbing/decomp PR across THP, fighter, game-mode, stage, interface, library, player, and baselib code. Evidence shows 28 changed files, 3659 additions, 193 deletions, 10 new matches, many partial-score improvements, and 4 unmatched-item regressions reported by the bot. The loaded diff excerpt mainly supports details for THPDec.c/thp.h and ftCo_Attack100.c; other files are supported primarily by changed-file metadata and bot match report.

key_files.role: THP header updates: added THPFileInfo x0C field and prototypes for newly decompiled THPDec functions.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: thp.h adds x0C and THPDec_8032F8D4/80330158/80331340/803313D0 prototypes

key_files.role: Added THP/JPEG marker parsing, scan setup, decode-row wrappers, temporary local structs, and MWERKS inline asm for GQR setup.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: adds THPDec_8032F8D4, THPDec_80330158, THPDec_803310CC, THPDec_80331340, THPDec_803313D0
text_corpus: bot report lists THPDec .sdata2 new match and partial improvements for THPDec_8032F8D4, THPDec_803310CC, THPDec_80330158, THPDec_80331340

key_files.role: Unstubbed several common fighter catch/hook/grapple/jump-related functions and added needed includes.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: adds includes ft_0D27.h, ftCo_ItemScrew.h, mplib.h and functions ftCo_800D730C, fn_800D9558, fn_800D8EC8, fn_800D9930
text_corpus: bot report lists new matches fn_800D9CE8, fn_800DA8E4, fn_800DA054, ftCo_CapturePulledHi_Phys and high partial improvements for fn_800D9558, fn_800D8EC8, fn_800D9930, ftCo_800D730C

key_files.role: Large Kirby SpecialN unstubbing/matching work; exact code details are not in loaded excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists new matches ftKb_SpecialLw1_Coll, ftKb_SpecialAirLwEnd_Coll, ftKb_SpecialNSpit0_Anim, ftKb_SpecialNSpit1_Anim and multiple partial improvements

key_files.role: Game-mode decomp progress; exact code details are not in loaded excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists partial improvements for fn_80161154 and gm_80166378

key_files.role: Game-mode decomp progress with one .sdata2 regression reported.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists partial improvements for gm_801BAD70 and gm_801BDE94 and regression for main/melee/gm/gm_1BA8 .sdata2

key_files.role: Game-mode decomp progress; exact code details are not in loaded excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists fn_8018B090 improvement from 0.00% to 63.37%

key_files.role: Baselib synth decomp progress; exact code details are not in loaded excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists partial improvements for HSD_Synth_8038A000, HSD_Synth_8038ADD0, and HSD_SynthSFXSampleLoadCallback

key_files.role: Sound test decomp progress with one unmatched-item regression reported.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists improvements for un_802FFF2C and un_802FF9DC and regression for un_80300B58

key_files.role: Audio library edits with partial improvement and two unmatched-item regressions reported.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists improvement for fn_80023254 and regressions for lbAudioAx_80028690 and lbAudioAx_8002838C

key_files.role: Additional touched headers/source: ftCaptain/types.h, ftLink/types.h, ftSamus/types.h, ftYoshi/types.h, ftcoll.c, ftdynamics.c, gm_1601.h, gm_1B03.c, gm_1BA8.static.h, grflatzone.c, grinishie1.c, soundtest.h, lbmthp.h, plbonuslib.c, plbonuslib.h, pl/types.h, synth.h, synth.static.h.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists selected matches/improvements/regressions among these files

what_changed: Replaced multiple stubs with C implementations across THP, fighter, game-mode, stage, interface, audio, player, and baselib files.
Updated headers/types alongside body work, including THP prototypes, THPFileInfo layout, fighter motion vars/type structs, and public/static header signatures.
Added local temporary structs in THPDec.c for scan/decode info layouts with offset-style fields and padding.
Added or changed includes in ftCo_Attack100.c to support recovered calls and types.
Bot report recorded 10 new matches, including several ftCo_Attack100 functions, Kirby functions, grInishie1_801FC664, and THPDec .sdata2.
Bot report recorded 39 improvements in unmatched items and 4 regressions in unmatched items.
smart_moves: Body and header changes were paired where prototypes or struct layout were needed, especially in thp.h and THPDec.c.
The PR used typed local structs with explicit offsets for THP scan/decode work instead of only raw pointer arithmetic.
Several fighter functions used existing typed accessors/macros such as GET_FIGHTER, GET_ITEM, HSD_JObjSetupMatrix, and fighter/item variable fields in the loaded excerpt.
The bot report makes the blast radius visible by listing both new matches/improvements and regressions.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For broad unstubbing PRs, a bot report can establish which edits produced full matches versus partial improvements, but it does not by itself prove every new body is fully matched.
When recovering a function body exposes a signature or struct field, update the owning header/type definition in the same PR rather than relying only on source-local declarations.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: thp.h adds x0C and THPDec prototypes used by THPDec.c

decomp_lessons.lesson: Temporary offset-named structs can make large unknown binary layouts more reviewable than raw byte offsets, but semantics should remain conservative until stronger evidence exists.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPScanComp, THPScanInfo, THPDecodeInfo with xNN/padNN fields

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style function names were retained for uncertain functions, such as THPDec_8032F8D4, THPDec_80330158, THPDec_803310CC, fn_800D9558, and fn_800D8EC8.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: added functions retain address-style names

naming_conventions.convention: Unknown struct fields use offset-style xNN names and explicit padNN arrays until semantic names are supported.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPFileInfo x0C, THPScanInfo x70/x72/x8BC/x8CC/x8CE/x8D0, THPDecodeInfo x8D4/x8EA/x8EE/x8F0/x8F4/x8F8

naming_conventions.convention: Common local role names in loaded code include fp, gobj, item, jobj, attrs, vel, bonePos, effPos, and grav when roles are locally clear.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: THP decode wrappers use MWERKS-gated inline assembly to write GQR5/GQR6 before calling shared THP bitstream/decompress helpers.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPDec_80331340 and THPDec_803313D0 contain #ifdef __MWERKS__ asm mtspr GQR5/GQR6

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK and UNUSED locals appear in recovered fighter functions, apparently as stack/codegen steering tactics, but the PR slice does not include reviewer justification beyond score output.
Natural for-loops are used for repeated component/signature scans and scan component expansion in THP and fighter code.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPDec_8032F8D4 loops over ncomp and segment length
diff_excerpt: THPDec_803310CC loops over x7C components and count
diff_excerpt: ftCo functions loop over grapple effect frames

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: String literals such as "JFIF" and the THP OSReport text remain inline in the loaded THP code rather than being promoted to external symbol names.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: char jfif[] = "JFIF" and OSReport("THP does not support anything other than 4:2:0!\n")

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Matched code increased by 0.09% (+3428 bytes); matched data increased by 48 bytes. Report listed 10 new matches, 39 improvements in unmatched items, and 4 regressions in unmatched items.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Regressions reported for lbAudioAx_80028690, gm_1BA8 .sdata2, un_80300B58, and lbAudioAx_8002838C.

follow_up_queries: PR 2561 THPDec_80331340 inline asm GQR5 GQR6
PR 2561 remaining unstubbed bot report 10 new matches

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, merge state, counts, changed files
diff_excerpt/raw_diff: detailed excerpt for thp.h, THPDec.c, ftCaptain/types.h, part of ftCo_Attack100.c
text_corpus: empty PR body and decomp-dev bot report
notes: PR body is empty and there are no loaded human review comments.
The raw diff is truncated in loaded_files; only some files have detailed code evidence in the excerpt.
Many changed files are represented only by changed-file metadata and bot score output, so file-specific tactics for those files are not inferred.
The bot report gives score movement and new matches but is not a complete substitute for local build/objdiff evidence for every changed symbol.
Merge state is supported by metadata, but no human acceptance rationale is available in the slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Large unstubbing PRs need per-symbol score triage
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2561 shows a broad unstubbing change can include full matches, partial improvements, and regressions in the same bot report; downstream curation should distinguish these categories rather than treating all added bodies as matched.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Conservative offset/address names in remaining-unstubbed work
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2561, uncertain recovered functions and fields kept address-style or offset-style names such as THPDec_8032F8D4, fn_800D9558, x8CC, and pad8D6, while local variables used clear role names where evident.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THP and ftCo_Attack100 added bodies
diff_excerpt: THP temporary structs and ftCaptain/types.h x4

source_update_candidates.title: Require explicit notes for MWERKS inline asm exceptions in non-SDK-like decomp bodies
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2561 includes MWERKS-gated inline asm in THPDec_80331340 and THPDec_803313D0 to set GQR registers. This may be acceptable for THP/SDK-adjacent code, but curator may consider whether standards should ask PRs to state why inline asm is unavoidable and what adjacent checks were done.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPDec_80331340 and THPDec_803313D0 asm blocks
source_update_candidates.reason: Loaded evidence shows inline asm use but no human rationale; route as a possible standards clarification, not an accepted rule.

source_update_candidates.title: Large decomp PRs should annotate known bot regressions
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2561 bot output reports four regressions alongside broad progress. Curator may consider a source update encouraging broad decomp PRs to explicitly acknowledge and justify any bot-reported regressions before merge.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists 4 regressions in unmatched items
source_update_candidates.reason: The current standards already mention regression ledgers; this PR is supporting evidence for possibly strengthening large-PR guidance.

rejection_notes: Do not promote all PR 2561 functions as matched; the bot report distinguishes 10 new matches from many partial improvements.
Do not infer reviewer intent or human approval rationale; no human review comments are loaded.
Do not create path facts for every touched file from this slice alone; many files lack detailed diff excerpts.
Do not treat PAD_STACK/UNUSED locals as endorsed permanent style; evidence shows use but not justification.
